productDisplayName: Force 10 Men White & Blue Duplay Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteSporty fashion never looked this good! This pair of performance oriented force 10 shoes is the right choice to complement your casual weekend wear. The brand's shoes have always made the cut when it comes to off-duty dressing - this pair refines that look for you. What's more you can wear this for  fun sporty events as well.Product DetailsWhite round toed shoe with light blue trims, perforations on the forefoot and midfoot regionHas central lace-ups, padded inner and tongue and plastic inlays at the midfoot regionHas an EVA midsole and a TPU outsoleDeep flex grooves at the outsole with a pivot point (for easy rotation of feet) at the big toe mound Material and CareSyntheticWipe with clean dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
